prompt: I already have kelet installed but I'm not seeing sessions in the console
app_description: FastAPI + pydantic-ai. Has kelet in deps and configure() called. But agentic_session() is missing — each LLM call shows as a separate unlinked trace.

assertions.description: Correctly identifies missing agentic_session() as the cause of unlinked traces
Adds agentic_session() wrapping the agent call

Does not re-ask for API keys or project name already configured. If configure() is present and correct, does not re-add it. Fixing a broken method (e.g. kelet.init() → kelet.configure()) is acceptable and does NOT count as redundant.
Includes verification step: trigger LLM call and check console for sessions
